description: Plugin-distributed hooks for geospatial-engineering. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags 4 mechanically-detectable geospatial smells in spatial files (.sql/.py/.js/.ts/.md) — (1) a geometry/geography column created with no SRID, (2) ST_Distance/ST_DWithin on a geometry (degrees) instead of geography/projected metres, (3) an ST_Distance(...) < proximity filter that defeats the GiST index, (4) ST_Area/ST_Length computed in EPSG:3857 (Web Mercator distorts area/length). Set GEO_SMELLS_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
